title: Pondering While Solo Camping
overview: Gen’s peaceful solo camping trip is interrupted by a first timer without a tent.

title: Enjoy Going Solo
overview: Shizuku insists on camping with Gen until she's comfortable camping solo, so they go solo camping together.

title: Beware of Gear Acquisition Traps
overview: Gen and Shizuku go shopping for camping gear together.

title: What Do You Do While Camping?
overview: Shizuku is unable to explain why she wants to go camping alone, so she asks Gen for his thoughts.

title: The Path You Choose Yourself
overview: Gen examines his feelings on camping with Shizuku, while Akihito hangs out with Shizuku and her friends.

title: Master Mode
overview: Gen teaches Shizuku the basics of campfires.

title: The Origins of Going Solo
overview: Gen thinks back on his camping experiences and when he started camping solo.

title: Katsu! Use Gear Properly
overview: Gen is appalled by the state of Shizuku's backpack and teaches her how to pack properly.

title: Occasionally, Like a Master
overview: Shizuku embarks on her first multi-day camping trip with Gen.

title: Because I Like Gen-san
overview: Shizuku runs into Gen's old flame.

title: Goodbye, Gen-kun
overview: Gen and Kana reflect on their relationship and breakup.

title: My Personal Preferences
overview: Shizuku and her friends have a cookout to prepare for their upcoming cottage camping trip.

title: What Do You Think of Shizuku?
overview: Shizuku explores a new way to enjoy the outdoors by cottage camping with her friends.

title: Dreaming While Camping Out Alone
overview: Gen meets a bicycle camper while enjoying some time outdoors.

title: Camping Like Ships Passing in the Night
overview: Akihito and Gen reconnect and reaffirm their friendship over their shared interest in camping.

title: Graduation Test?!
overview: Gen asks Shizuku to choose their next campsite.

title: You Don't Mind If I Take Him, Right?
overview: While checking out a new campfire stand at a camping supply store, Gen runs into Yui.

title: Solo Camping for Three
overview: Yui returns from her bike ride to an awkward and strained atmosphere at the campsite.

title: I'm Not Scared!
overview: Gen decides to tell Shizuku about his dream but finds it difficult to broach the subject.

title: I Don't Want to Graduate Yet
overview: Gen gives Shizuku a gift to celebrate one year of solo camping for two.

title: What I Can Do
overview: Gen advises Shizuku on how to choose a hard cooler, and Shizuku teaches Gen about the wonders of Dutch ovens.

title: A Dream Spun with Someone
overview: Shizuku reevaluates what she wants to do with her future.

title: Are You Giving It Serious Thought?
overview: When Shizuku, Gen, Yui, and Kai end up camping together, they try to make the best of an awkward situation.

title: We're Solo Campers for Two
overview: Shizuku decides what she wants to do about her vaguely-defined relationship with Gen.
